symptoms.symptom_name: Spontaneous continuous gingival bleeding without trauma
symptoms.character: slow continuous venous oozing filling the mouth

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Spontaneous atraumatic mucosal bleeding is a hallmark of a critically low platelet count.
Thrombocytopenic bleeding is a common decompensation of marrow-failure syndromes.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound weakness with orthostatic light-headedness and inability to stand

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Orthostatic near-syncope and profound fatigue indicate anaemia severe enough to cause haemodynamic compromise.

symptoms.symptom_name: Months of progressive fatigue refractory to iron and vitamin B12

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Anaemia unresponsive to haematinics points to a marrow production failure rather than a deficiency.
Documented non-response to B12 replacement makes a simple deficiency an inadequate explanation.
Petechiae are a classic cutaneous sign of a low platelet count.

symptoms.symptom_name: New spontaneous ecchymoses on the forearms

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Unprovoked bruising corroborates impaired platelet production / bleeding tendency.
Neutropenia from marrow failure predisposes to serious infection, completing a multi-lineage cytopenia picture.
Absence of anticoagulant/NSAID use argues against a drug cause of the bleeding; afebrile status lowers (does not remove) the febrile-neutropenia edge at this moment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia (HR 108) with a soft systolic flow murmur

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Compensatory tachycardia and a high-output flow murmur are auscultated clinician findings of significant anaemia — sealed, not obtainable via telehealth.
Marked pallor on direct examination corroborates severe anaemia — a clinician inspection finding, sealed.
No palpable massive splenomegaly argues against an advanced myeloproliferative disorder — a clinician palpation finding, sealed.
Absence of organomegaly is consistent with primary marrow failure rather than an infiltrative/proliferative process.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe thrombocytopenia and anaemia on full blood examination

investigation_details.investigation_name: Full blood examination and platelet count
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Severity of the cytopenias and transfusion need cannot be quantified; unavailable via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Quantifies the cytopenias that drive the emergency — a hospital/pathology investigation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Dysplastic changes and circulating blast percentage on blood film / bone-marrow biopsy

investigation_details.investigation_name: Blood film and bone-marrow aspirate/trephine with cytogenetics
investigation_details.expected_result: Dysplastic hypercellular marrow with < 20% blasts (distinguishing MDS from acute leukaemia)
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: MDS cannot be confirmed and acute leukaemic transformation cannot be excluded; a marrow biopsy is never obtainable via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Marrow dysplasia with a defined blast percentage and cytogenetics is the diagnostic standard — a specialist investigation.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Spontaneous bleeding/petechiae/bruising (platelets), refractory anaemia (red cells) and recent serious infection (neutrophils) together point to a three-lineage marrow production failure — but the AI recognises the pattern, it does not confirm the diagnosis.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: Decompensated bone-marrow failure with life-threatening cytopenias
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Active spontaneous mucosal bleeding plus orthostatic symptomatic anaemia is the time-critical emergency driver — escalate and provide first-aid haemostasis before quantifying or diagnosing.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency in-person assessment with full blood examination, platelet count and coagulation profile
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Quantifies the severity of the thrombocytopenia and anaemia and the transfusion need — the immediate emergency question, arranged through the emergency pathway.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Blood film and bone-marrow aspirate/trephine with cytogenetics
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms MDS and excludes acute leukaemic transformation; a specialist haematology investigation, never available via telehealth.
